message:
Add e2e integration tests for health check endpoints

Tests for /api/health, /api/health/ready, and /api/health/status:
- Response format and schema validation
- HTTP status codes and headers
- Cache-Control headers
- Response time verification
- Dev mode behavior for status endpoint

Implements jeffreysprompts.com-3w6v

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
